title: quercus × diegoi
intro: Quercus × diegoi, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Quercus robur and Quercus ithaburensis, is a deciduous tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × diegoi include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Quercus × diegoi can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
